Notes

Camera capture: Camera capture, movie recording, and video processing utilities. The Camera class is explicitly marked unavailable on tvOS — no cameras on Apple TV.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of VideoIO? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
